content.text:
{"success":true,"process_rule_id":"J09D","process_rule":"1. Copy decision table into table J09D_temp where the tour starts with J09D.
2. Add ENTSCHEIDUNG column to the table. Rule: Set ENTSCHEIDUNG to "KSA" when a HAUS has less than 3 EQUNR. ELSE set ENTSCHEIDUNG to "EVU".
3. Classify meter reading type.
4. JOIN table with EABLG table using INSTALLATION.
5. JOIN table with SALES_MASTER and NET_MASTER table using EQUNR.
6. Compare customer sales master data and net master data.
7. Check if sales customer data is NOT empty:
    - If yes: Use sales customer data table entries.
    - Else: Use net data customer table entries.
8. Export the final data from the table as CSV file named J09D using these column names: `Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No.`, `HAUS`, `ANLAGE`, `ME_MA_ID`, `EQUNR`, `HOUSE_NUM1`, `ENTSCHEIDUNG`, `TITLE`, `FORENAME`, `SURNAME`, `STREET`, `STREETNO`, `POST_CODE1`, `CITY1`, `CITY2`, `EMAIL`.
9. Send email with the CSV file to EVU. Email address: meter.readings@evu.com. File path: <path_to_exported_csv_file>.
10. Delete temporary table."}

structured_content.process_rule:
1. Copy decision table into table J09D_temp where the tour starts with J09D.
2. Add ENTSCHEIDUNG column to the table. Rule: Set ENTSCHEIDUNG to "KSA" when a HAUS has less than 3 EQUNR. ELSE set ENTSCHEIDUNG to "EVU".
3. Classify meter reading type.
4. JOIN table with EABLG table using INSTALLATION.
5. JOIN table with SALES_MASTER and NET_MASTER table using EQUNR.
6. Compare customer sales master data and net master data.
7. Check if sales customer data is NOT empty:
    - If yes: Use sales customer data table entries.
    - Else: Use net data customer table entries.
8. Export the final data from the table as CSV file named J09D using these column names: `Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No.`, `HAUS`, `ANLAGE`, `ME_MA_ID`, `EQUNR`, `HOUSE_NUM1`, `ENTSCHEIDUNG`, `TITLE`, `FORENAME`, `SURNAME`, `STREET`, `STREETNO`, `POST_CODE1`, `CITY1`, `CITY2`, `EMAIL`.
9. Send email with the CSV file to EVU. Email address: meter.readings@evu.com. File path: <path_to_exported_csv_file>.
10. Delete temporary table.

EMAIL (TEXT) Email address

# Table: decision_table
## column_name (type) description
HAUS (TEXT) House identifier
ANLAGE (TEXT) Installation/facility identifier
ABLEINH (TEXT) Reading unit identifier

POST_CODE1 (INTEGER) Postal code
EQUNR (TEXT) Equipment Number

# Table: eabl
## column_name (type) description
Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No. (TEXT) Meter Reading Document Number
EQUNR (TEXT) Equipment Number
Geplante Ableseart (INTEGER) Planned reading type
MR type (TEXT) Meter reading type code
MR TYPE TEXT (TEXT) Meter Reading type description
MR category (TEXT) Meter reading category
ISTABLART_TXT (TEXT) Actual reading type description (SAP)
LOGIKZW (TEXT) Logic indicator

Record created on (TEXT) Record creation date

# Table: eablg
## column_name (type) description
Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No. (TEXT) Meter Reading Document Number

Scheduled MR Date (TEXT) Scheduled meter reading date
Meter Reading unit (TEXT) Meter reading unit
Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No..1 (INTEGER) Secondary/duplicate Meter Reading Document Number

# Table: eanl
## column_name (type) description
Installation (TEXT) Installation identifier
Installation type (TEXT) Type of installation
Record created on (TEXT) Record creation date
Object changed on (TEXT) Object modification date

BRANCHE (TEXT) Industry/sector code
BRANCHE_TEXT (TEXT) Industry/sector description
ABLEINH (TEXT) Reading unit identifier
ME_MA_ID (TEXT) Meter/Measuring point ID
HAUS (TEXT) House identifier

# Table: process_rules
## column_name (type) description
process_rule_id (TEXT) PRIMARY KEY - Process rule identifier
process_rule (TEXT) NOT NULL - Process rule text/description"}

args.sqlite_command: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS J09D_temp AS SELECT * FROM decision_table WHERE TOUR LIKE 'J09D%'
ALTER TABLE J09D_temp ADD COLUMN ENTSCHEIDUNG TEXT
UPDATE J09D_temp SET ENTSCHEIDUNG = CASE WHEN (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM J09D_temp t2 WHERE t2.HAUS = J09D_temp.HAUS) < 3 THEN 'KSA' ELSE 'EVU' END
UPDATE J09D_temp SET ANLAGE = (SELECT eablg."Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No." FROM eablg WHERE eablg.EQUNR = J09D_temp.EQUNR LIMIT 1)
UPDATE J09D_temp SET ANLAGE = (SELECT eanl.Installation FROM eanl WHERE eanl.EQUNR = J09D_temp.EQUNR LIMIT 1)
UPDATE J09D_temp SET ANLAGE = (SELECT eablg.Installation FROM eablg WHERE eablg."Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No." = J09D_temp.ANLAGE LIMIT 1)
UPDATE J09D_temp SET ANLAGE = (SELECT eablg.Installation FROM eablg WHERE eablg.Installation = J09D_temp.ANLAGE LIMIT 1)
UPDATE J09D_temp SET ANLAGE = (SELECT eablg.Installation FROM eablg WHERE eablg.Installation = J09D_temp.ANLAGE LIMIT 1)
UPDATE J09D_temp SET ANLAGE = (SELECT eablg.Installation FROM eablg WHERE eablg."Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No." = J09D_temp.ANLAGE LIMIT 1)
UPDATE J09D_temp SET ANLAGE = (SELECT eablg.Installation FROM eablg WHERE eablg.Installation = J09D_temp.ANLAGE LIMIT 1)
UPDATE J09D_temp SET ANLAGE = (SELECT eablg.Installation FROM eablg WHERE eablg.Installation = J09D_temp.ANLAGE LIMIT 1)
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM J09D_temp
PRAGMA table_info(J09D_temp)
SELECT * FROM J09D_temp LIMIT 5
SELECT * FROM eablg LIMIT 5
